goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '18:45' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the north
Make sure you get postcode and hotel type
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 18:45 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
